meaning: vt.缂栨垚娉曞吀,浣挎硶寰嬫垚鏂囧寲
examples: This book helped codify the classic fantasy story.
Second, codify the service use cases into service tests.
The main problem remains the same: how to codify a complex frame of reference.
The company board found the ornaments gaudy, but wanted to improve and codify the concept.
The legislation, which is an amendment to the Clean Air Act, will codify EPA authority.
